bead.title: align: HELIX repo-wide alignment review 2026-04-26
bead.description:
<context-digest>
Top-down reconciliation review for the heimq repository.
Stack present: ADRs + 02-design contracts + 03-test test plan. No 00-frame/01-spec layer (project skipped Vision/PRD).
Recent closures: Phase 5 e2e suite (epic heimq-700e47b2) and Pluggable storage backends (epic heimq-2136e295) — both still open pending broader epic AC verification.
Known drift: tests/contract.rs:185 asserts (2,0,7) for ListOffsets, but src/protocol/mod.rs:27 caps at 5 per commit 331b93b. heimq/target/ was tracked until commit c7cd03d.
</context-digest>
Top-down reconciliation review for repo scope.
Scope areas: protocol-contract, storage-backends, consumer-groups, e2e-tests, contract-tests, project-hygiene.
bead.acceptance: Alignment review complete; all gaps classified; execution issues created for real gaps; traceability matrix produced; report at heimq/docs/helix/06-iterate/alignment-reviews/AR-2026-04-26-repo.md
